summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard recording of a solid show, highlighted by an incendiary Estimated Prophet and a powerful second set.
review: The SBD source is praised as crisp and “super sweet,” delivering a clean listening experience with only minor digi‑static that can be attenuated. Musically the concert shines on the second half – Estimated Prophet (Jerry’s solo is called “on fire”), Standing on the Moon and Victim receive strong mentions, while the first set has a few weaker spots like Far From Me and Row Jimmy. Overall fans are enthusiastic, noting both great performance moments and high‑quality audio.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show 4–5 stars and highlight excellent soundboard quality; only one mixed review lowers the average slightly.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, sweet SBD with occasional digi‑static (audience patch) that can be reduced; no major dropouts reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is short and a bit uneven, but the 1:45 second set is described as one of the best of the tour, with strong transitions and high energy.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His solo on Estimated Prophet is called "on fire"; occasional moments where he 'didn't always find his place' in Victim.
band_member_comments.Phil: Great bass work noted on Box; overall solid foundation.
band_member_comments.Bob: Out‑of‑tune keyboards mentioned, but praised for leading the Estimated Prophet section.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keyboard (Bobby) described as out of tune at times, yet shoulders the Estimated Prophet.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drummers have a false‑start early in the second set but later provide fun, arena‑shaking beats.
